name: Duo Security
description: Multi-factor authentication platform. Monitor MFA enrollment, user access, and authentication policies.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Duo Admin Panel
2. Go to Applications → Protect an Application
3. Find 'Admin API' and click 'Protect'
4. Grant 'Read' permission for the integration
5. Copy the API Hostname, Integration Key, and Secret Key
6. Paste all values below

credentialFields.label: API Hostname
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Duo Admin Panel → Applications → your Admin API app. Format: api-XXXXXXXX.duosecurity.com

credentialFields.label: Integration Key
credentialFields.helpText: From the Admin API application in Duo Admin Panel.

credentialFields.label: Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: From the Admin API application in Duo Admin Panel.

checks.name: Duo Security App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Duo Admin API is accessible.

checks.name: Duo MFA Compliance
checks.description: Verifies MFA enrollment status across users.
